note: PUBLIC RELEASE BLOCKER for managed sidecars: GVF can install verified external FFmpeg/ffprobe into ~/.gvf/runtime/ffmpeg once platform URLs, exact builds, licenses, and SHA-256 digests are approved. Until then status remains blocked and setup guides users to system FFmpeg. Binaries are never shipped in npm.

binaries.blockReason: No independently approved Darwin arm64 LGPL FFmpeg download URL + SHA-256 published for GVF OSS yet. Use system FFmpeg (brew install ffmpeg) or GVF_FFMPEG_PATH.
